MODELS_DIR.label: Dir
MODELS_DIR.help: Filesystem path to the directory where AI models are stored; required for initializing the LocalAI plugin during tests.

CACHE_DIR.label: Dir
CACHE_DIR.help: Filesystem path to the cache directory for model assets used by the LocalAI plugin during tests.

LOCAL_SMALL_MODEL.label: Small Model
LOCAL_SMALL_MODEL.help: Filename of the small local AI model; overrides the built-in default model if provided.

LOCAL_LARGE_MODEL.label: Large Model
LOCAL_LARGE_MODEL.help: Filename of the large local AI model; overrides the built-in default model if provided.

LOCAL_EMBEDDING_MODEL.label: Embedding Model
LOCAL_EMBEDDING_MODEL.help: Filename of the embedding model used for vector embeddings; overrides the default if supplied.

LOCAL_EMBEDDING_MODEL_REPO.label: Embedding Model Repo
LOCAL_EMBEDDING_MODEL_REPO.help: Optional HuggingFace repo used to resolve LOCAL_EMBEDDING_MODEL downloads.

LOCAL_EMBEDDING_DIMENSIONS.label: Embedding Dimensions
LOCAL_EMBEDDING_DIMENSIONS.help: Optional embedding dimension override; when omitted, dimensions are inferred from model defaults/hints.

LOCAL_EMBEDDING_CONTEXT_SIZE.label: Embedding Context Size
LOCAL_EMBEDDING_CONTEXT_SIZE.help: Optional embedding context size override; when omitted, context size is inferred from model defaults/hints.

CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES.label: Visible Devices
CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES.help: Used to detect if CUDA-enabled GPUs are available and configure device and data type settings for model components accordingly.
